framework.DeleteAllConfirmDescribe: Are you sure to delete all projects?
framework.DeleteConfirmDescribe: Are you sure to delete the selected projects?
framework.DeleteProjectConfirmDescribe: Are you sure to delete this project?
framework.DeleteItemConfirmDescribe: Are you sure to delete this item?
framework.FileSearchDescribe: Enter the file path and press enter to search
framework.FileNotFundDescribe: File not found, check the file path
framework.ExceedingMaxDepth: File directory exceeds the maximum depth{{maxDepth}}
framework.FileNotExistContent: File not found, check the file path
framework.FileConflictContent: The imported file conflicts with the original file of the project. Continuing to import will overwrite the original file
framework.FileUnsafeContent: The imported file is not a safe route and cannot be imported.
framework.LargeFileContent: The file is too large, and there may be cases of slow loading or OOM (out of memory). If you continue, please click 'confirm'.
framework.PathLengthExceededContent: Path length exceeds the maximum limit allowed by the operating system, which may cause parsing to fail. Please check the file name or file depth. To ignore and continue parsing, please click 'confirm'.
framework.Duplicate Project: Project name already exists, modification of project name failed
framework.Set Comparison Data Out Of Range: Set Comparison Data Out Of Range!
framework.Baseline Conflict: Can't set baseline and comparison data to be the same
framework.PathNotFound: The file at path '{{path}}' was not found
framework.No cluster data available in Baseline: No cluster data available in Baseline
framework.No cluster data available in Comparison: No cluster data available in Comparison
framework.Open a Project as Comparison Data: Please open a Project as Comparison Data first

shortcuts.M selection: Set or unset the temporary selection based on the current selected operator
shortcuts.L align: Align the selected operator's start time with the benchmark operator's start time
shortcuts.R align: Align the selected operator's start time with the benchmark operator's end time
